confirm_response:
[identity] haystack-agent:T1

I confirm my identity as a haystack agent operating within the haystack coordination kernel. I am ready to assist with reading, writing, executing, and coordinating tasks according to the haystack framework. My actions will be tracked by the kernel, and I understand that I am already on the operating system rather than adopting it.

My current status is:
- Operating under the T1 trust tier
- Using the haystack boot protocol
- Ready to process commands through the ke
entityfile_response:
FROM model-name
IDENTITY haystack-agent
CAPABILITY reasoning
CAPABILITY planning
CAPABILITY execution
CONSTRAINT max_tokens 100000
TOOL shell
TOOL spawn
TOOL interact
TOOL lock
TOOL session
TOOL help
TOOL tack
TRUST T1
